g.text: A ruthless defender of your investment discipline.
Open-source personal investment research co-pilot · Rust core · 7 surfaces · 1 brain
From world signal to your inbox · 11 pollers, 1 brain, 7 surfaces
EVENT ENGINE CORE · classify · polish · route · digest
quiet_mode · daily cap · cooldown · advance threshold
id PK + INSERT OR IGNORE dedup
INTELLIGENCE · agent runners · tool registry · llm provider
used by both PUSH (classify · polish · summarize) and CHAT (turn → respond)

CHANNELS HUB · the bus that connects everything
crates/hone-channels/src/ · 8 binaries plug into one HoneBotCore
main + auxiliary LLM provider · session/quota/profile storage · runtime admin overrides
pretrigger window · shared session · explicit trigger
SINKS · per-platform render adapters · OutboundSink trait
selects sink by actor/channel/kind · LogSink fallback
What the user sees · how it persists
